title: Dataset
description: A Power BI dataset representing a data model

id.description: The unique identifier of the dataset

name.description: The display name of the dataset

addRowsAPIEnabled.description: Whether the push API is enabled for this dataset

configuredBy.description: The user who configured the dataset

isRefreshable.description: Whether the dataset can be refreshed

isEffectiveIdentityRequired.description: Whether effective identity is required for embedding

isEffectiveIdentityRolesRequired.description: Whether RLS roles are required for embedding

isOnPremGatewayRequired.description: Whether an on-premises gateway is required

targetStorageMode.description: The storage mode of the dataset

createReportEmbedURL.description: URL to create an embedded report on this dataset

qnaEmbedURL.description: URL for the Q&A embedded experience

webUrl.description: The web URL of the dataset

createdDate.description: The date and time the dataset was created
